narrative:
Precinct Piqua 1-A (precinct in Miami County) has 587 registered voters, with 72.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
